Localization.Set button image based on response: Set button image based on response
Localization.Specify the JSON path and expected value: Specify the JSON path and expected value in the API response to choose which image to show on the key.
Localization.A missing path will search for the expec: A missing path will search for the expected value as a string anywhere in the response body.
Localization.A missing expected value will treat the: A missing expected value will treat the field at the JSON path as a Boolean, where true is considered "matched".
No file... Click the icon on the right to choose a file
Localization.Periodically poll a URL for status: Periodically poll a URL for status
Localization.Parse different field and value from sta: Parse different field and value from status response
Localization.res-tip1: You can use * to show everything, or use a JSON path like data.follower.
Localization.res-tip2: You can wrap multiple fields with double braces. Use \n for a newline. For example: {{data.follower}}\n{{info.name}}
